title: com.para.civic.getCabildeo
summary: Detail query for a single indexed cabildeo, including aggregate counts and viewer context.
lifecycle: Read whenever the client opens a single cabildeo detail page.
Hydrates both aggregate counts and the current viewer’s civic context.
writers: Not written directly by clients; served from indexed civic state.
moderation: Viewer context can change what the user is allowed to do next even when the query succeeds.

fields.name: cabildeo
fields.description: URI identifying the cabildeo whose indexed detail view should be returned.

fields.name: output.cabildeo
fields.description: Indexed civic detail object returned to the client.
